name: Stan
description: Stan enables people to make living and work for themselves.

name: Unnamed Company
description: N/A

name: TrimRx
description: TrimRx is a telehealth company that specializes in personalized weight loss programs using GLP-1 medications like Semaglutide and Tirzepatide. With licensed medical providers, FDA-registered pharmacies, and a focus on safety, effectiveness, and ongoing support, TrimRx has helped thousands of clients across the U.S. achieve their weight loss goals.

name: Rezi
description:
Most people agree this is the best resume builder in the world.

We have about 1M new users every year. 

Rezi Enterprise, a new and growing product, supports over 300 organizations, including 1 fortune 500, and multiple universities. 

We are now working to allow companies a way to connect with job seekers, and bridge the gap between company and job seeker while bringing transparency to job seekers.

name: Kibu
description:
Content, compliance, and EHR (Electronic Health Record) software platform built specifically for provider organizations serving people with intellectual and developmental disabilities (I/DD). 

It helps these organizations teach people with special needs while managing regulatory compliance, documentation, and care delivery across hundreds of organizations and 48 states.

name: 1Capture
description:
Double Your Trial-to-Paid
Conversion Without Making Product Changes.

name: Cometly
description: Marketing attribution and analytics for SaaS companies. Use AI to chat with your ads data.

name: Brand On Demand, Inc.
description: Supliful is an all-in-one platform for Creators to launch and operate a scalable CPG brand. Our approach unifies the entire business cycle – from product selection all the way through e-commerce enablement and order fulfillment – into a single digital platform with no upfront costs. We charge customers at the time they make the purchase.

name: DM Champ
description: This Al Is So Good It Feels Illegal: Watch it convince a stranger to put down $1,000 on a $40,000 treatment. No human involved. Just Al selling like your best closer, except it works 24/7 and never takes a day off. Use it for your own business. Or white-label it, sell it to others, and charge them monthly. Keep everything.

Use AI to generate realistic UGC-style videos and images for ads and socials.
Launched in October, went from 0 to 1M ARR in 3 months.

name: SEO STACK
description: SEO stack is an SEO/marketing SaaS that offers data warehousing with AI. It is a rebuild of Google search console with Google analytics, it allows SEOs and marketers to get better results in search engines and LLMs, it also provides AI and LLM visibility tracking.

name: DataExpert / TechCreator
description: DataExpert.io is a data engineering education company that empowers data engineers to level up their skills and become content creators as well!

name: Stealth Venture
description: Health and Wellness fitness app for iOS

name: flibbo AI
description: Flibbo is an all in one AI app where users can access top image, video, music, and chat models in one place instead of paying for multiple tools. It also includes tutorials, sample prompts, and a social feed where active users share creations and ideas. The platform is built to be plug and play, helping both beginners and advanced users create faster, learn prompting, and discover what is working through real community content.

name: OpenClaw Pro
description: OpenClaw Pro is the fastest way to get up and running with your very own OpenClaw instance. One click, easy deployment.

name: AEO Engine
description: AEO Engine is a living network of AI agents that collaborate in perfect sync - researching, creating, optimizing, and amplifying your content every day. Each one plays a role in expanding your visibility, guided by a central orchestrator that learns and adapts with every result to deliver compounding growth across Google, ChatGPT, AI Overviews, Perplexity, and beyond.

name: Private Venture
description:
Reddit GEO/LLM Agency for B2B SaaS ($1M-$10M ARR). 

Monthly Financials: • Revenue: $50,000 MRR • Costs: ~$13k (Reddit fees + Account Manager + Writer) • Net Profit: ~$37,000/mo (75% Margin as Owner-Operator).

Growth: 100% Inbound & Referrals. We have ZERO sales process (no follow-ups), offering huge upside for a commercial buyer to close our ignored leads.

Deal: Asking $500K and open with Seller Financing as we trust the growth of the next months with the right buyer.

name: AI startup
description: N/A

name: Launch Club
description: Reddit marketing to improve AI search.  SaaS helping business owners learn how to promote their products. Also provide tools and content creation for members.

name: Crush AI
description: Crush analyzes competitors, generates creatives, and optimizes your spend to scale what works and turn off what doesn't.

name: Lunchbreak
description: Lunchbreak helps students and professionals make AI-generated content undetectable across all major detectors, including Turnitin and GPTZero, while keeping their natural tone and voice.

name: Bookedin
description: BookedIn ai is a no-code AI platform agencies use to create and manage AI receptionists and sales agents across voice, SMS, email, and messaging apps like Instagram. These agents can instantly engage leads after form fills, handle inbound calls, run outbound follow-ups, and reactivate old leads—qualifying prospects and booking meetings automatically to improve speed-to-lead, show rates, and revenue without extra headcount.

name: LocalRank.so
description: All-in-one AI Local SEO Software

name: Private Enterprise
description: N/A

name: Interactive Video SaaS
description: Premier interactive video software used for education, training, marketing. $48k MRR + some services revenue. Easy to use, drag and drop editor rebuilt from the ground up in 2025, fully documented and clean with little to no tech debt. One full-time employee. Owner works 3-5 hours per week and can be replaced by a fractional engineer. High SDE. Great fit for a video-based company in the education or training space as an upsell. ***Offers must include LinkedIn profile***

name: ChatDash, LLC
description: ChatDash is a white-labeled AI assistant dashboard solution tailor-made for agencies, enabling them to provide clients with a customizable, brandable interface for managing their own Knowledge Bases. This platform enhances the value agencies offer by saving them time on Knowledge Base maintenance and allowing for higher ticket pricing for their AI chatbot services. With plans catering to various agency sizes, from small startups to established firms, ChatDash combines full Voiceflow and OpenAI Assistant API integrations with dedicated support, offering a premium, branded client experience across the board.
